name: SGT GRM.PE KGAA NA O.N.
summary: Grupo Empresarial San Jos√É¬©, S.A. engages in construction business in Spain and internationally. It constructs hospitals, buildings and facilities, energy power plants, and infrastructure projects, as well as conserves parks and gardens; and undertakes civil, and engineering and industrial construction works. The company also researches and develops energy efficiency and renewable energy projects; and provides consultancy and project management services for the architecture, civil engineering/infrastructure, real estate management, technology, and development projects. In addition, it engages in agriculture and cattle businesses; and distributes sport and fashion clothes under the Arena, Teva, Hoka, Diadora, Hunter, Fred Perry clothing, and Dr. Martens brands. The company was formerly known as Udra S.A. and changed its name to Grupo Empresarial San Jos√É¬©, S.A. in June 2008. Grupo Empresarial San Jos√É¬©, S.A. was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.
